item.title: Warning: If Your iPhone Is On This List, You Need To Update It Now
item.description: Apple has released a new iOS 26 update — but millions of iPhone users are still running iOS 18. Here’s why delaying is increasingly risky.

item.title: Cannabis Hyperemesis Syndrome Cases In Virginia ERs Up By Nearly 29%
item.description: The Virginia Hospital & Healthcare Association Data Analytics Teams weeded through data on emergency department visits for cannabis hyperemesis syndro...

item.title: Dave Baljon On The Upcoming ‘Samurai Pizza Cats: Blast From The Past!’
item.description: With the upcoming game 'Samurai Pizza Cats: Blast from the Past!' on the way, I caught up with the CEO of Blast Zero, Dave Baljon, about the game.

item.title: Pursuing Personal Happiness Is Getting Boosted Via Timely Advice From Generative AI Such As ChatGPT
item.description: Generative AI such as ChatGPT can be used to guide you toward personal happiness. It is quite timely and useful. Watch out for these pitfalls. An AI I...

item.title: ‘Transformers: The Movie’ Celebrates 40th Anniversary With Hilarious Apology
item.description: Now that 'Transformers: The Movie' is celebrating its 40th anniversary this year, Hasbro has decided to make an apology.
